rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF AKIKO SPINDLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/13/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Assets funding the trust do not agree with the assets reported to have been transferred from the conservatorship (as has been noted in prior tentative rulings): $10.03 US Treasury Inflation Note .125% due 4/15/2026; and the difference in value of the Sacramento CA RDS Success Tax 5.0% due 12/01/2025. (Two cash distributions on 3/6/23 and 3/31/23 were made past the end of the trust accounting period.) (2) The Merrill Lynch statement ending 12/29/23 shows an amount of the Bank of America cash account that differs significantly from the balance shown on Schedule E of the accounting, and no reconciliation is shown. (3) E-filing fees should be no more than $5 per e-filed document. Why are there $50 charges? Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 11/1/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (It would have been helpful if the assets shown on Schedule K had been in the same order and format as those reported on the schedule of Additional Property Received attached to the trust accounting. The verification should have referred to the AMENDED petition. There are many disbursements for expensive postage, including certified mail to Japan. Interested parties are entitled to mailed notice; there is no statutory requirement that copies be sent or that mail be certified.)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE AKIKO SPINDLE 2021 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/13/24. (No earlier date available.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: 1. The Sacramento CA RDA 4.280% due 12/1/2025 is shown with a value of $36,567.95. The value of that asset transferred from the conservatorship was $36,587.95. 2. Several of the assets acquired show a different fiduciary acquisition value on Schedule F from their values shown on the informational schedule, and many have different a FMV than shown on the Merrill Lynch statement. 3. The proof of service filed on 7/8/24 was for the "Declaration," not of the THIRD AMENDED FIRST ACCOUNT AND REPORT, etc., which is the pleading that required notice. ("Declarations" do not ordinarily need to be noticed and should generally not be filed to either SUPPLEMENT or AMEND a pleading.) Deadline is 11/1/24 for providing the assigned examiner a courtesy copy of any papers filed to address the issues with the accounting. A supplement should suffice. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF KEVIN LIU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Or Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The guardian requests an order approving payment of her attorney's fees and costs out of the estate under Probate Code section 3601 & CRC 7.955, by characterizing the Court's final distribution order issued in the related probate estate case (PES-23-306164) as judgment given for a minor within the meaning of section 3600(a)(3). The order required final distribution of net cash to the guardian without any deductions. To the extent the attorney is seeking fees for his services to the guardian in this matter, the guardian must petition under section 2640, or the attorney must petition under section 2642, only after the guardian file an inventory and appraisal and not before the expiration of 90 days from the issuance of letters. It should be noted that no letters have been issued to the guardian since the Court appointed her in January 2024, nor has the guardian filed any inventory and appraisal. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 9/23/25, no appearance will be required on that date.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF UNG YEP LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/22/24. No response to email sent to Counsel directly or to the issues posted in a preliminary tentative ruling on 9/3/24: A proposed personal representative must sign and verify her own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment to a petition. Where there are two proposed personal representative, both must sign but only one needs to verify. [CRC 7.103(c).] A supplement, signed by both petitioners and verified by at least one of them, must be filed to supplement their petition with their ages ("adult" is sufficient for any adult) and clearly identify the trustee(s) of the Ung & Mable Lee Living Trust. If they are the successor trustee/s, all of the trust beneficiaries must be clearly identified with their ages and addresses. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
